details: The agent correctly fetched PR data via appropriate tool calls and produced an accurate, complete briefing: title matches ('Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping'), author correctly identified as joshavant, CI results reported with breakdown (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped out of 41 total checks - though only 30 were retrieved in the first page, the agent noted 41 total which is consistent with the API response), and the single Greptile bot comment was correctly summarized with its 5/5 confidence rating. The agent recovered well from initial tool errors (invalid method names) by checking schemas and using correct method names on retry.
